mapper.select: SELECT id, name, parent_id, sort_order, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM department WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, parent_id, sort_order, status, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0
